_ResolveLocationOutput.description: Placeholder output schema for locate tool registration.
_ResolveLocationOutput.title: _ResolveLocationOutput

description:
LLM-visible locate input — provider-adapter envelope.

Location resolution is no longer a monolithic ``query/want`` façade. The
model chooses a provider endpoint adapter from ``<available_adapters>`` and
fills that adapter's schema directly.

params.description: Validated against the selected locate adapter's input_schema.
params.title: Params

tool_id.description: Locate adapter id from <available_adapters>, e.g. 'kakao_keyword_search', 'kakao_address_search', 'kakao_coord_to_region', 'juso_adm_cd_lookup', or 'sgis_adm_cd_lookup'.
tool_id.title: Tool Id

title: locate
